cover.title: more context isn't better
cover.sub: A 2026 ETH Zurich study benchmarked repo context files (AGENTS.md) across current agents. They lost.

slides.title: context files cut success ~3%
slides.body: On average, adding repository context files made agents less likely to finish the task. The opposite of the pitch.

slides.title: and raised cost over 20%
slides.body: A long auto-generated file dilutes the model's attention and pushes it to explore more. Lower success, higher spend.

slides.title: the answer isn't no context
slides.body: Short, human-written files that state what's true beat long auto-generated ones. The right context is the harder problem.

slides.title: serve the currently-correct doc
slides.body: Per query, path:line, marked canonical or stale. That's what trovex does, and it cuts roughly 60% of the tokens per lookup.

cta.title: try trovex on your repo
cta.sub: Serves your coding agent the one canonical doc per query, local and open source, ~60% fewer tokens. Read the teardown, star it.
